hypothesis: Combining Bollinger Bands, Volume Oscillator > 25 MA, and ATDirectionalMovementIndex indicators reduces false signals in trending markets while maintaining a reasonable number of trades.

Using RSI<30 and Aroon Up in a Crypto market (0GUSDC) with EMA + OBV for entries, the strategy aims to capture trending opportunities while mitigating risk by eliminating trades that have low volume or conflicting signals. The strategy also applies ATR-based stop loss and take profit based on volatility.
This strategy uses Bollinger Bands and ATR with RSI to identify trend reversal in the crypto market (0GUSDC, 1H timeframe) while filtering out low volume trades.
Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.
